description: The honest pre-0013 shape (eval-harness review 2026-07 finding #16): a compliant memo whose run provably attached evidence (research.agent_runs.input_refs, mirrored here as run_attached_evidence) but whose bodies predate the memo_evidence table and were never backfilled. The pre-fix judge accused it of fabrication three ways (grounding 0.0000 'ungrounded number', refs 0.0000 'dangling', conviction 'low_without_evidence'). Grounding and refs must be n/a — not scoreable, counted in the report — and the conviction cap must not fire; the bundle passes overall. A memo with refs, no bodies and run_attached_evidence FALSE (fabricated refs) keeps failing closed — the unit suite pins that side.

memo.thesis: The committee rejects AVGO for new capital: the record shows 0 of 4 walk-forward folds passed for the momentum family, so no validated strategy covers the name.
kill_criteria: AVGO enters the xsmom-pit winner decile at a monthly rebalance
The close falls below the SMA50 for five consecutive sessions
memo.dissent: Persistent relative strength argues the point-in-time machinery will select this name shortly, and a standing rejection that flips at the next rebalance whipsaws the watchlist while surrendering the entry.
